summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 features: Guest Post Expiration and New Post Notifications. All 16 backend tests passed. All UI flows verified including expiration badges on BlogCards and guest post notices on PostPage.
passed_tests: Guest post creation without auth (with guest_author) - PASS
Guest post without guest_author correctly rejected - PASS
Authenticated user post has null expires_at - PASS
Active guest post appears in GET /api/posts listings - PASS
include_expired parameter works correctly - PASS
Posts include expires_at field for guest posts - PASS
Active guest post not marked is_expired - PASS
Single post endpoint includes expires_at - PASS
Admin stats includes expired_guest_posts count - PASS
Admin stats includes all expected fields - PASS
Post creation triggers notification task (async) - PASS
Guest post creation triggers notification task - PASS
Category filtering works correctly - PASS
Search filtering works correctly - PASS
Pagination works correctly - PASS
BlogCard shows expiration badge with Timer icon - PASS
BlogCard shows 'Xd left' countdown for guest posts - PASS
PostPage shows guest notice with yellow styling (>7 days) - PASS
Write page shows guest author fields when not logged in - PASS
Write page shows 30-day expiration notice for guest posts - PASS
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed guest posts for expiration testing. These will expire naturally in 30 days.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest Post Expiration feature fully tested. Guest posts get expires_at set to 30 days from creation. GET /api/posts excludes expired posts unless include_expired=true. BlogCard shows Timer icon with 'Xd left' badge. PostPage shows colored notice (red=expired, amber=<7days, yellow=>7days). New Post Notifications trigger async email to ALL registered users via Resend API.

details: Guest posts receive expires_at = now + 30 days on creation
GET /api/posts filters out expired posts by default
include_expired=true query param includes expired posts
GET /api/posts/{id} returns is_expired=true for expired posts
BlogCard shows Timer icon with countdown badge
PostPage shows colored expiration notice based on days remaining
All registered users (except author) receive email
Currently shows 0 expired since all test posts are new
